Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember reading a rumor about[n]this vending machine online...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But I'm not in the mood to[n]drink anything right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm not in the mood to drink[n]anything right now...[n]{f 1 1}
